name: Fridge
description: Client lives with his wife and five children in a two room HDB rental flat. Client's right arm is paralyzed since an accident in 1993 and constantly experiences dizziness and pain in his eyes, chest and arm. He is medically assessed to be permanently unfit for work, even though his wife has a blue collar job that the family of 7 relies on for daily need. Of the 5 children, 2 older children are currently working part time so that they can reduce their financial dependence on the family. The 3 younger children are still schooling. Despite the older children working part-time, the combined income is insufficient to replace the household fridge. We are thus seeking a kind donation of a fridge.

contact.org: MWS Covenant Family Service Centre – Hougang and Buangkok
contact.name: Odelia Tan
